description.value:
A subdermal port with an implant-grade microvalve. Injectables route through the shunt's filtration ring before entering the bloodstream — most of the carrier-payload reaches receptors, but the body's reward circuits register the metered dose, not the spike.

Attunement. Requires attunement.

Filtered uptake. While attuned, you have advantage on Constitution saving throws against addiction to injury-administered substances delivered through the shunt.

effects.name: Neural Shunt — Save Modifier
effects.description: Grants advantage on Constitution saving throws against addiction to injury-administered substances delivered through the shunt.
